basic_details.job_title: BECIL Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL) Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 09 July 2026 on the official website becil.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Senior Technical Assistant post through the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in Aquaculture or Zoology or Fisheries or Marine Biology from a recognized University or Equivalent
qualification.details: Master Degree in Aquaculture or Zoology or Fisheries or Marine Biology from a recognized University or Equivalent.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility criteria Interview/Assessment/Skill Test Final Selection by Client
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.becil.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BECIL Senior Technical Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BECIL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.becil.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BECIL Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant recruitment is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master Degree in Aquaculture or Zoology or Fisheries or Marine Biology from a recognized University or its equivalent to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Technical Assistant post is 32 years. Age relaxation details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Senior Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Senior Technical Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 56,640/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for BECIL Senior Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 295/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the BECIL Senior Technical Assistant job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Technical Assistant post announced in this recruitment drive by BECIL.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on eligibility criteria, followed by an interview or assessment/skill test. The final selection will be made by the client.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for the Senior Technical Assistant position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the BECIL official website, www.becil.com. Direct links are provided in the Important Links section of this article.
